params.text: Patient is a 71-year-old female with hypertension and on long-term medications. Vital signs stable: BP 136/81, HR 96, SpO2 96%. Labs notable for creatinine 1.1, troponin normal. Patient clinically stable. Plan: Continue current management, monitor vitals, await pending test results. Will disclose test results to patient when available.

params.plan_text: Follow up with primary care in 1 week. Continue home medications. Monitor blood pressure daily. Return if symptoms worsen. Pending lab results will be communicated to patient.
